author: Nintendo Everything
text:
List of all Nintendo Switch 2 games that support GameShare

With GameShare becoming an important part of Nintendo Switch 2, we’ve put together a complete list of games that support the feature. We’ll be updating this post over time as well. GameShare is brand new for Nintendo Switch 2. With the feature, select titles allow you to play with others even if they don’t own a copy of the game....

The post List of all Nintendo Switch 2 games that support GameShare appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Easy Delivery Co. getting “EasyCo EasyRally” update

Easy Delivery Co. is confirmed to be receiving an update shortly, which is known as “Easy Delivery Co.”. It should be available for Nintendo Switch on July 6, 2026. The highlight here is the “EasyCo EasyRally” mode. It comes with new rally style driving physics, new music, “approximately 1.5 new maps”, and more. Here’s the full rundown: This game mode...

The post Easy Delivery Co. getting “EasyCo EasyRally” update appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
SEGA / Atlus hosting new Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch sale with Sonic Origins Plus, Unicorn Overlord, and more at new low prices

Fans of SEGA and Atlus can save big on Switch 2 and Switch games as part of new sale on the Nintendo eShop. Over thirty titles are included here with some familiar names in the lineup. We’ll mention that a number of games are at new low prices here such as the individual Etrian Odyssey games, Sonic Origins Plus, Unicorn...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Banchou Tactics: Lion Heart announced for Nintendo Switch 2

Itsara Amata and Corecell today unveiled Banchou Tactics: Lion Heart, which we’ll be seeing on Nintendo Switch 2. The game is planned for a 2026 launch. Banchou Tactics: Lion Heart is an action tactical RPG. It’s set in a Japanese high school and you’ll be taking on rival schools throughout the game. Here’s what’s been shared so far: Itsara Amata...

The post Banchou Tactics: Lion Heart announced for Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road reveals free Contenders for Glory DLC

Today, Level-5 revealed the next piece of DLC for Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road, which is Contenders for Glory. It’s due out on July 3, 2026. Contenders for Glory will be a free update. It will bring about the Victory Road tournament, which is happening between July 3 and July 23. Other additions such as a new difficulty level in Chronicle...

The post Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road reveals free Contenders for Glory DLC appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo Switch 2 ends first full year in the U.S. at nearly 6 million units sold, second fastest-selling video game system

Following the latest U.S. sales report from Circana, we have information about the first full-year sales of Nintendo Switch 2. The console ended its first twelve months at 5.9 million units sold. According to Circana, it’s the second fastest-selling video game system in the U.S. with tracked history dating back to 1995. The only other platform to outdo it was...

The post Nintendo Switch 2 ends first full year in the U.S. at nearly 6 million units sold, second fastest-selling video game system appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Best-selling games in the U.S. for May 2026 – Yoshi and the Mysterious Book cracks the top 10

Circana has released a listing of the top ten best-selling games in the U.S. for the month of May 2026. In its first month, Yoshi and the Mysterious Book comes in at #8. It’s actually not the top Nintendo game though. Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream holds staying, landing at #5 (it was #1 the previous month). Here’s a look...

The post Best-selling games in the U.S. for May 2026 – Yoshi and the Mysterious Book cracks the top 10 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Grim Trials coming to Nintendo Switch 2

Soft Source and Glory Jam are planning Grim Trials, it’s been revealed. The game launches on August 20, 2026. A demo is now available on the Nintendo eShop. Grim Trials, a heavy metal action roguelite, has players exploring the afterlife of the The Academy. Other than battling enemies, you’ll befriend other Reapers, learn from mentors, and uncover the secrets of...

The post Grim Trials coming to Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
3D adventure platformer Tolem announced for Nintendo Switch

Frost Earth Studio has announced Tolem, a 3D adventure platformer. It’s coming to Nintendo Switch on July 23, 2026. Tolem is built around elemental transformations. In the game, you’ll play as a small robot with no memory, in a world overrun by hostile machines. You’ll cleanse four corrupted worlds, master elemental forms, face multi-phase boss battles, and uncover the truth...

The post 3D adventure platformer Tolem announced for Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Mario dev Takashi Tezuka not retiring from Nintendo, contrary to previous reports

Takashi Tezuka is not fully retiring from Nintendo, despite many assuming that this would be the case. Back in May, we heard that Tezuka was retiring as an executive officer from the company. We cautioned that it was unclear what his role would be moving forward, but many ran with the idea that he would be leaving Nintendo entirely. It...

The post Mario dev Takashi Tezuka not retiring from Nintendo, contrary to previous reports appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
